description_long: This object is a stylized potted plant with three elongated, angular green leaves emerging from a central base. The leaves are arranged in a fan-like pattern, with the central leaf standing upright and the two side leaves splaying outward. The pot itself is not distinctly visible, suggesting the design is minimalistic and the focus is on the foliage. The leaves have a smooth, slightly glossy surface with subtle shading that gives them a faceted, geometric appearance. The coloration is a uniform medium green, with no visible decorative elements or patterns on the base. This plant would likely serve as a decorative accent in modern urban environments, such as on a sidewalk, in a park, or near a building entrance.
description: A minimalistic potted plant with three angular green leaves arranged in a fan shape, featuring a smooth, geometric design and no visible pot decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three leaves, with the central leaf upright and the two side leaves splayed outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the central leaf and one side leaf, with the other leaf partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view with the central leaf most prominent and the two side leaves extending backward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the central leaf and the other side leaf, with the first side leaf now partially hidden.
